title: berkheya speciosa subsp. speciosa
intro: Berkheya speciosa subsp. speciosa, also known as the Golden Daisy, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Berkheya speciosa subsp. speciosa include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function, making it a potential remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and then used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
